title: Mascot generating states
description: Overlay the mascot on generating cards with lifecycle states: idle (big/center, replaces spinner) while waiting, shrinks + slides bottom-right when the first latent preview arrives (cooking), happy pop center on done then fades. idle<->greet src flip at a random 4-8s interval. Single pointer-events:none sibling of the spinner in MpiGalleryGrid card; driven by CSS classes off the existing setGenerating/updatePreview/setDone hooks. Assets exist: assets/mascot/{idle,greet,happy}.png. Video gens: same behavior.
